CustomField.formula: IF( OR(SalesPeriod__c - ThisPeriod__c = 1) ,IF (spot__c ,EstimatedAmount__c ,IF (Month(occur_revenu_month__c) < 7 , EstimatedAmount__c * (7- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12 , EstimatedAmount__c * (19- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12)) ,IF (spot__c,0,EstimatedAmount__c) )
CustomField.label: 来期売上想定額
